---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

Include a minimal failing code snippet where possible.

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen. For data-correctness bugs, include the expected record shape and field values and their source (provider API documentation, official data release, or reference implementation).

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or the observed record output (with enough precision to see the discrepancy — field names, values, and any relevant `DataProvenance` or `DataIssue` fields).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04]
- .NET version: [e.g., .NET 10.0]
- Adapter package and version: [e.g., `Boutquin.MarketData.Adapter.Tiingo` 0.1.0]
- Date range and symbol(s) involved: [e.g., AAPL 2024-01-01 to 2024-03-31]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, provider API response payloads, or code samples that help reproduce the issue.
